summary: Completed testing of Accounting Layer features (Party Ledger, Payments, Reports, Credit Notes) and Compliance extensions to Dispatches and Stock Adjustments. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - pages load correctly with proper components.
critical_code_review_comments: All accounting layer APIs are fully implemented and working
Party Ledger API returns proper structure with party info, entries, total_debit, total_credit, current_balance
Payments API supports both 'received' and 'made' payment types with proper validation
Accounting Reports (Receivables, Payables, Profit Summary) return comprehensive data with age analysis
Credit Notes API supports creation with line items and GST calculations
Dispatches now have doc_status and compliance_score fields for compliance tracking
Stock adjustments create compliance exceptions for high-value adjustments (>50000)
Compliance Alert Banner only appears when there are actual issues (expected behavior when no issues exist)
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test payments (1 received, 1 made) and 1 credit note during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting Layer is fully functional. Routes: Party Ledger at /accountant/ledger, Payments at /accountant/payments, Reports at /accountant/reports, Credit Notes at /accountant/credit-notes. Compliance Alert Banner appears on Admin and Accountant dashboards only when there are open exceptions or pending drafts. All APIs working: /api/party-ledger/{party_id}, /api/payments, /api/reports/receivables, /api/reports/payables, /api/reports/profit-summary, /api/credit-notes. Dispatches and Stock Adjustments now have compliance validation with doc_status and compliance_score fields.
features_tested: Admin Dashboard loads with stats and Overview tab
Accountant Dashboard loads with stats (Reverse Pickup, Spare Dispatch, Repaired Items, Pending Labels, Ready to Ship)
Compliance Alert Banner component exists and only shows when there are compliance issues
Party Ledger page loads with party selector, date filters, and Apply Filter button
Payments page loads with stats cards, tabs (All/Received/Made), and Record Payment button
Accounting Reports page loads with 3 tabs (Receivables, Payables, Profit Summary)
Credit Notes page loads with stats and New Credit Note button
API: GET /api/party-ledger/{party_id} returns ledger entries with proper structure
API: POST /api/payments creates new payments (both received and made types)
API: GET /api/reports/receivables returns receivables data with age analysis
API: GET /api/reports/payables returns payables data by supplier
API: GET /api/reports/profit-summary returns profit data with monthly breakdown
API: GET /api/credit-notes returns credit notes list
API: POST /api/credit-notes creates new credit notes
Dispatches have doc_status and compliance_score fields
Compliance matrix includes dispatch and stock_adjustment transaction types
Stock adjustments create compliance exceptions for high-value adjustments

frontend_ui_tests.payments_tabs: PASS - All, Received, Made tabs visible
frontend_ui_tests.accounting_reports_tabs: PASS - Receivables, Payables, Profit Summary tabs visible
